role: A conditional in-surface call-to-action banner that surfaces the pending-decisions count and opens the decisions list modal.
capabilities: Reads pending decisions count from decisionsStore
Renders a clickable button that opens the decisions list
Provides accessible aria-label and count copy
substance_why: The component fully implements its scoped behavior: it consumes store state, decides whether to render, and wires a click handler to open the list with accessible copy.
interactions_present: Clicking the inbox-entry button calls openDecisionsList
interactions_missing: No loading or error state while decisions are fetched
No empty-state rendering beyond returning null
No keyboard shortcut or focus management for the modal trigger
No direct rendering of the decisions list (modal lives in DecisionsInbox)
performance_risks: Subscribes to the full pending array via useDecisions, causing re-renders whenever the array reference changes
No memoization of the rendered bar or count label
Inline pluralization and string construction run on every render
reuse_why: The count-to-CTA logic and open action are domain-specific and worth preserving, but the markup, class names, and layout placement will be rebuilt in the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Separate the responsive layout shell (inbox-bar positioning) from the entry button
Extract count/pluralization formatting into a reusable utility or hook
Isolate the store subscription if other surfaces need the same pending count
